chapter_title.ar: بَابُ يَوْمِ النَّحْرِ وَ مُبْتَدَإِ الرَّمْيِ وَ فَضْلِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 173 – The day of the sacrifice, and beginning the pelting (of the Jamarah), and its merits

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/146)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/146)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: رَمْيِ الْجِمَارِ قَالَ لَهُ بِكُلِّ حَصَاةٍ يَرْمِي بِهَا تُحَطُّ عَنْهُ كَبِيرَةٌ مُوبِقَةٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Abdullahasws, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding pelting of Al-Jamarah. Heasws said to him: ‘With each pebble one pelts with, a major sins get Obliterated from him’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Hammad from Hariz who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that with every pebble that one throws on al-Jamar, one major destructive sin is deleted.”
